---
title: "diag_engine.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/diag_engine.py"
loc: 32
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.45
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 8.90
overall_score: 6.02
---

## Intent
Core semantic routing engine for intent resolution.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate SovereignEngine and invoke run(query) to process natural language directives.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `DiagnosticEngine`
- `execute`
